name: kernel-cli
description: CLI skills for managing Kernel cloud browsers, apps, authentication, and browser automation

interface.shortDescription: Manage cloud browsers and browser automations with the Kernel CLI
interface.longDescription: Installs Kernel CLI skills for creating and debugging cloud browsers, automating websites, managing authentication, profiling bot detection, and deploying browser apps.
defaultPrompt: Use Kernel to automate a website in a cloud browser.
Use Kernel to debug a browser session.
Use Kernel to set up managed authentication for a website.
